nasb.text: “Beware of the false prophets, who come to you in sheep’s clothing, but inwardly are ravenous wolves.

esv.text: “Beware of false prophets, who come to you in sheep’s clothing but inwardly are     ravenous wolves.

cnv.text: “提防假先知！他們披著羊皮到你們當中，裡面卻是殘暴的狼。

ccb.text: “你们要提防假先知，他们披着羊皮到你们当中，骨子里却是凶残的狼。

csbs.text: “你们要提防假先知。他们披着羊皮来到你们这里，里面却是凶残的狼。
